name: BOM Item-node
label: Node
description: Breadcrumb path of the Kit Content Framework node this component maps to, e.g. "KWL Kit > HS Components > Core Tubings > Stress Control Tube". Set automatically when this BOM is generated from a Kit Content Mapping. Implemented as Data rather than a Link to Kit Content Framework Item because Frappe's Link autocomplete does not reliably query child-table (istable) doctypes — list permissions and the search dialog assume a standalone list view that child doctypes don't have.
